mapper.select: SELECT r.*, usr.user_nm AS user_nm, rol.role_nm AS role_nm, usr2.user_nm AS grant_user_nm FROM sy_user_role r LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN sy_role rol ON rol.role_id = r.role_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr2 ON usr2.user_id = r.grant_user_id WHERE r.user_role_id = #{id}
